license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfyfjptn
title: Citrate Buffer
author: Neilier Junior

steps_raw.instruction: pH range: pH 3.0 to pH 6.2 (a) 0.1 M Citric acid: 19.21 g L -1 (M.W.: 192.1 g mol -1 ) (b) 0.1 M Sodium citrate dihydrate: 29.4 g/l (M.W.: 294.0 g mol -1 ) Mix citric acid and sodium citrate solutions in the proportions indicated and adjust the final volume to 100 mL with deionized water. %s %s
Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter. The use of pentahydrate salt of sodium citrate is not recommended.
